initiatives.name: Fairbanks Community Food Bank
initiatives.description: A community organization fostering mutual aid and food security through food distribution networks in Interior Alaska. They coordinate food recovery, emergency assistance, and community support while building power through volunteer mobilization and creating pathways for food access.

initiatives.name: Tanana Chiefs Conference
initiatives.description: A tribal consortium fostering mutual aid and community wellness through traditional Athabascan values in Interior Alaska. They coordinate healthcare access, social services, and cultural programs while building power through Indigenous-led initiatives and creating pathways for tribal sovereignty.
